title: Child safety seat with drive belt tensioner
abstract: FIELD: vehicles.SUBSTANCE: invention relates to child safety seats for use in passenger vehicles, such as cars. Child safety seat comprises a built-in safety belt for retaining a child in the seat, a drive safety belt tensioner and a controller. Proposed tensioner comprises tensioner driven by …

title: Vehicle component control methods and systems
abstract: Control system for controlling at least one part of a vehicle includes a plurality of sensor systems mounted at different locations on the vehicle, each sensor system providing a measurement related to a state thereof system or a measurement related to a state of the mounting location.
